name: Galvan at Twinbrook
approxRentRange: $2,438-$2,822/mo for 2BR (912-1,109 sq ft); 1BR+den from $2,639/mo; overall community from ~$1,864/mo
bathroomsNote: All 2BR floor plans (B01 through B17, 912-1,109 sq ft) have 2 baths. 1BR+den (AD04, 886 sq ft) has 1 bath.

notes.management: RAM (acquired from JBG SMITH); modern industrial mixed-use building above Safeway grocery; directly across from Twinbrook Metro (Red Line)
notes.doormanDetail: Concierge confirmed as named amenity with named staff (Manny, Dawn, Ethan, Linda cited in reviews). Reviewer reports indicate evening-only shifts (~5-11 PM for concierge); leasing office Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm, Sun 12pm-5pm. No evidence of 24-hour staffing. One review noted management did not renew concierge contract. Classified as Daytime only pending confirmation from building directly.
notes.balconyDetail: Juliet balconies listed in marketing copy for select units; patio/balcony listed as in-unit amenity across listings
notes.packageDetail: Package receiving confirmed as listed amenity across multiple sources
notes.climateDetail: No source specifies whether HVAC is unit-controlled or building-controlled. Multiple listings list air conditioning as an amenity but do not distinguish central building system from in-unit thermostats. Marked Unclear.
notes.elevatorDetail: Elevator confirmed; reviewers note it goes out periodically, sometimes for 2+ weeks at a time
notes.petDetail: Cats and dogs welcome; specific fees and weight limits not found in scraped sources
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Overall rating approximately 4.2/5 on maintenance surveys. Positive reviews cite prompt same-day or next-day maintenance response. Negative reviews cite recurring A/C disputes, elevator outages lasting weeks, and management quality decline after acquisition by RAM. Mixed picture; Unclear is the honest read.
notes.transitAccess: Directly across from Twinbrook Metro Station (Red Line); Safeway in building
